observations.summary: The air is heavily saturated with the smell of salt, creating a choking sensation.
observations.notes: This sensory detail evokes a strong physical atmosphere, suggesting proximity to the sea or a saline environment.

observations.summary: A cold, pervasive stench emanates from the deep, pressing in from all directions.

evidence.quote: The cold stench of the deep pressed in from every direction.

observations.notes: This creates a claustrophobic and ominous mood, implying an oppressive or threatening presence from the depths.
